name: HMS ML 453 (ML 453)
events: 8 Apr 1943 HMS P 511 (Lt. J.S. Launders, RN) conducted A/S exercises off the Isle of Mull together with FFS Commandant Detroyant and HMS Promise (T/Lt. S.A. Sargent, RNVR), ML 559 (T/Lt. C.A. Head, RNVR) and ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (1)

10 Jan 1944 HMS H 28 (Lt. J.W. Kelly, RN) proceeded from Tobermory to Campbeltown. She was escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR) until 1000 hours when HMS Blade (T/A/Lt.Cdr. S.T. Wenlock, RNR) took over. (2)
24 Feb 1944 HMS Uther (Lt. A.A. Catlow, RN) shifted from Tobermory to Oban. She was escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (3)
25 Feb 1944 HMS Uther (Lt. A.A. Catlow, RN) shifted from Oban to Tobermory. She was escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (3)
8 Apr 1944 HMS United (Lt. N.R. Wood, RN) proceeded from Oban to Tobermory. She was escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (4)
7 Jul 1944 At 1810 B/7, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Tobermory for Rothesay. She was initially escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR).
At 1830 B/7, HMS Blade (T/A/Lt.Cdr. S.T. Wenlock, RNR) took over the escort. (5)
30 Aug 1944 HMS Vitality (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted gunnery exercises off Tobermory on a target that was towed by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (6)
13 Mar 1945 At 0720 A/13, HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) departed from Tobermory to Oban to fuel. She arrived at Oban at 1025 A/13. She was escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (7)
14 Mar 1945 At 1430 A/14, HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) departed Oban for Tobermory where she arrived atound 1645 A/14. She was escorted by HMS ML 453 (T/Lt. L.V. Horne, RNVR). (7)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
